untranslatable_reason: Triangle pattern detection (descending vs ascending) requires multi-bar pattern recognition and support/resistance level identification. These are not available in the provided indicators. Donchian channels approximate breakout levels, but cannot distinguish triangle formation geometry, rally compression, or narrowing price action required by the signal.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used dc_upper/dc_lower for resistance/support breakout detection and adx_14 > 25 to confirm trending context. However, the core requirement—identifying descending triangle (narrowing rallies off support) vs ascending triangle (narrowing pullbacks from resistance)—cannot be expressed without pattern recognition or custom bar-pattern metrics. A proper implementation would require a custom pattern detector external to this rules engine.
